name: forge-plugin
description: Root package entry for FORGE plugin — hosts the npm test script for the lightweight regression runner at scripts/run-tests.mjs and declares the `forge` bin entry that launches the wrapper TUI. Plugin distribution is governed by .claude-plugin/plugin.json; MCP server deps live in mcp/package.json; Node runtime for .js files remains CommonJS (no "type" field here, do not add one).
